title: Cobblemon Classic
description: A cobblemon modpack that combines the feel of both old school minecraft with old school pokemon through various changes and tweaks. Also has a offical server!
body:
# Cobblemon Classic

## Combining Old and New!

Welcome to Cobblemon Classic, This server is dedicated to bringing classic pokemon and classic minecraft together, with some of the new pokemon and minecraft mechanics added!

With a mix of classic mods, challenging trainers, and old school pokemon mechanics, how will you become the very best?

## Minecraft Features

Oldschool minecraft mechanics

Classic dimension mods Aether and Twilight Forest, with pokemon spawns added for both

Classic Beta textures for a nice nostalgic look

Classic terrain generation

Copper equipment to make copper useful

## Cobblemon Features

Gen 1, Gen 2, Gen 1 & 2 beta pokemon, and later gen evolutions/forms are available

356 Pokemon to catch and battle with total!

Attempts to replicate gen1 battle mechanics with my limited code knowledge

Gen 2 sprites for each and every pokemon! (there is an optional model pack as well!)

Trainers, Kanto/Johto Gym Leaders, and the Elite Four, Champion, and Gym Leader rematches
